message:
feat(replication): use real RaptorQ repair symbols via asupersync encoder

Replace placeholder deterministic repair symbols with actual RFC 6330
RaptorQ encoding via asupersync::raptorq::systematic::SystematicEncoder.
Build encoder from source symbols and call encoder.repair_symbol(esi).
Falls back to deterministic placeholder only if encoder construction fails.

Applied to both replication_sender and snapshot_shipping paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
